results.title: task/reduction_debug/eval/v1
results.summary: Repair the broken Triton row-sum kernel that drops the last column from its reduction mask. Print JSON with visible_row_sum, hidden_row_sum, and debug_summary describing the bug class and the concrete fix that restores full-column coverage.
